title: Physician Referrals * LGBTQ2+ Issues - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Diverse Populations > Physician Referrals * LGBTQ2+ Issues 1 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Refine Results - Select - LGBTQ2+ Issues Transgender Individuals AIDS/HIV Issues Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF GLMA PHYSICIAN REFERRALS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Works to bring about equality in health care services for individuals who identify as LGBTQ2+. While primarily providing services to health care professionals, the organization does also provide information services to patients, such as online directories, resource guides, and provider directories aimed at individuals who identify as LGBTQ2+. Website Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Not applicable Email (833) 456-2202 Visit Website More Details No Mapping Information Available
